axis: SSE-revert (proven 2026-04-01 config: 3-event envelope project_start+message_field_delta+project_field FINISHED + h2_end_stream=1 + tight /api/agent/ask_proxy path)
notes: iter10 revert to proven 2026-04-01 SSE 3-event config did NOT restore warning render. Engine clearly intercepted (request landed on genspark.ai/agents?id=... session, no AI response stream from upstream observed). Front-end behavior: after ~45s the response area transitions from empty-while-streaming state to a generic React error page reading 'Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page' with a 'Refresh Page' button — NOT the '차단' warning text. This is a NEW failure mode distinct from iter7-9 (which stayed blank). Hypothesis: the 2026-04-01 SSE schema is now incompatible with the current front-end (April→May front-end refactor likely changed the expected event sequence or required new fields). The component-load error suggests the SSE payload is reaching the React component layer but failing schema validation, causing the component to unmount/error rather than render the injected warning HTML.
next_axis_suggestion: Capture fresh HAR of a successful genspark conversation (engine OFF) to diff the current real SSE envelope vs the 2026-04-01 baseline — front-end schema has drifted. Then craft iter11 envelope matching the CURRENT schema and re-inject the warning HTML inside that. The 'tight path + h2_end_stream=1' parts of the revert are likely fine; the envelope itself needs forward-port, not revert.

comparison_to_prior_iters.iter9_998_path-expand: FAIL_NOT_RENDERED (blank response, engine intercept confirmed via etap log 09:45:41)
